roa.docketEntryComment: /TEXT/TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATION//X:AT 9AM,  ALL PRESENT AS HERETOFORE,  JURY DELIBERATION RESUMES,//X:IN OPEN COURT,  THE JURY HAS A REQUEST AND READ BY THE JUDGE THAT THE TESTIMONY OF OFFICER JOHNSON BE READ TO THEM AND THE COURT REPORTER PROCEEDEDREADING IT,/X:AT 1:44 PM, JURY HAS A VERDICT AND READ BY THE CLERK IN OPENCOURT AS FOLLOWS:NOT GUILTY TO ALL COUNTS,/X:JURY POLLED BY THE COURT AND UNANIMOUS,/X:COURT THANKED AND DISCHARGED THE PANEL,/X:ALL EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN BY COUNSEL,/X:BAIL SET ORDERED EXONERATED,/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL//X:OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY,  DEFENSE COUNSEL COUNSEL MADE A MOTIONPURSUANT TO 1118PC,/MO DENIED/X:IN CHAMBERS, OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE DA, DEFENDANT VASQUEZ AS PER CONVERSATION WITH HIS COUNSEL HARRIS INDICATED THAT HE WILL NOT TESTIFY IN HISOWN BEHALF,/X:IN OPEN COURT WITH EVERYONE PRESENT,  JURY TRIAL RESUMES,/X:AT THIS POINT, THE PEOPLE REST,/WIT SWORN D:RENEE SAUCEDO/EXHM:F-ID PHOTO AT LATINO DAY LABOR PROGRAM/EXHMA:G- PROPERTY REQUEST RELEASE FROM SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENTJILL SCHROEDER IS SWORN AND EXAMINED AS WITNESS FOR THEDEFENSE,/EXHMA:G-PROPERTY REQUEST RELEASE FROM SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/EXHMA:H-DUFFLE BAG/EXHM:I-POLAROID PHOTO OF MANILA ENVELOPE/EXHM:J-POLAROID PHOTOOF MANILA ENVELOPE/EXHM:K-POLAROID PHOTO OF BAG/EXHM:L-POLAROID PHOTO OF WALLET/X:AT 11:47 A,M,,IN OPEN COURT WITH ALL THE JURY, COUNSEL AND DEFENDANT PRESENT, JILL SCHROEDER, INVESTIGATOR FOR THE PUBLIC DEFENDER IS RECALLED TO THE WITNESS STAND,/EXHMA:M-WALLET/EXHMA:N-PILLS IN AN ENVELOPE,/X:SIDE BAR CONFERENCE AND DEFENSE REST,/X:AT 1:37 P,M,, CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH COUNSEL FOLLOWED BYREBUTTAL BY THE PEOPLE,/X:AT 3:30 P,M,,  COURT INSTRUCT THE JURY AS TO APPLICABLE LAWS, BAILIFF SWORN AND THE JURY RETIRES FOR DELIBERATION,/X:AT 5:00 P,M,, ADJOURN AND THE JURY ADMONISHED,/
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRETRIAL MOTIONS IN PROGRESS/WIT SWORN:DOUGLAS KORPI/ /TEXT:TRIAL PHASE VOIR DIRE- JURY SELECTION/
/INTR:CSR/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
/CAL:DEMURRER/MO DENIED/CAL:995PC MOTION/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 26//TRANS 26:FORTHWITH FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LD:12-02-2002/
